description:
Voice Powered Game Control

VoiceBot lets you take command with your voice! Say commands out loud to send actions to your games and applications. Use your voice to type keyboard shortcuts, click and move your mouse, and execute macros and scripts.
- Change: Updated to .NET Framework 10, will automatically install on update
- Change: Macros are now sorted alphabetically in Macro Groups
- Fix: Resolved an issue where toolbar tooltips were showing the ampersand meant for accelerator keys
- Fix: Resolved an issue where VoiceBot couldn't load WallpaperFusion tags correctly for profile images
- Fix: Resolved an issue where the file browser dialog couldn't load the Downloads folder
- Fix: General fixes and performance improvements
